DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sophia Behnia, Esq. (4150276-2561) of Littler for Defendant.

RULING - The matter is discussd. Counsel reports parties have a stipulation staying the matter pending the determination of the O'Connor matter. The Court vacats the tentative ruling and rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. and TRAVIS KALANICK'S SPECIAL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT AND MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS is off calendar. Order on the parties joint stipulation to stay proceedings is signed. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)
